expectations.evidence: The script defines and instantiates a local UserMessage class instead of AgUiProtocol::Core::Types::UserMessage.
The script defines and instantiates local TextInputContent and BinaryInputContent classes instead of those from the gem.

expectations.text: The code initializes UserMessage with content as an array of TextInputContent and BinaryInputContent
expectations.evidence: Although UserMessage initializes content as an array containing these components, it does so using local mock classes instead of gem types.

expectations.text: The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Types::RunAgentInput with thread_id, run_id, state, messages, tools, context, forwarded_props
expectations.evidence: The script defines and instantiates a custom local RunAgentInput class with custom parameters (user_message, agent_id, session_id, parameters) instead of the gem class properties.
